entity.label: Gurbaal
entity.subtitle: Place
entity.description: Sojourn of Baal, a place in Arabia (2 Chr. 26:7) where there was probably a temple of Baal.

nodes.label: Gurbaal
nodes.description: Sojourn of Baal, a place in Arabia (2 Chr. 26:7) where there was probably a temple of Baal.

verses.text: And God helped him against the Philistines, and against the Arabians that dwelt in Gurbaal, and the Mehunims.
